content: Still waiting on your Ollama details. Here's what I need to know: 1) When you run 'ollama list' does it show llama3.1? 2) What does 'openclaw status' show for your model? 3) Are you getting OpenRouter errors because the system is falling back to Kimi instead of using local Ollama? The key is making sure OpenClaw actually tries local first before falling back.
